purpose: Lock Still Paper into five tactile editorial directions so outputs do not collapse into generic beige cards.

SP-01 Mist Field.role: outdoor field notes / nature observation / light travel documentary
SP-01 Mist Field.imageTreatment: forest, field, hiking road, cloudy landscape, lake/mountain, clean photograph, no embedded typography
SP-01 Mist Field.layoutTone: quiet field note, centered image discipline, restrained metadata, enough negative space

SP-02 Warm Study.role: reading notes / creator diary / desk and coffee editorial
SP-02 Warm Study.imageTreatment: paper, notebook, coffee, books, ceramic, fabric, wood, soft window light
SP-02 Warm Study.layoutTone: warm study note, intimate but not cute, editorial and readable

SP-03 Coastal Quiet.role: coastal / lake / mountain reflection and wellness
SP-03 Coastal Quiet.imageTreatment: sea, lake, misty mountain, open sky, quiet human figure, blue-gray natural light
SP-03 Coastal Quiet.layoutTone: open, breathable, reflective, light but not empty

SP-04 Night Grain.role: film / game / night observation / cinematic reflection
SP-04 Night Grain.imageTreatment: night street, film still, game key art, shadow, rain, low-light still life
SP-04 Night Grain.layoutTone: cinematic, restrained, high contrast, less copy, strong focal image

SP-05 Hearth & Table.role: food / coffee / home / kitchen / table scenes
SP-05 Hearth & Table.imageTreatment: food close-up, cafe table, ceramic, bread, fruit, coffee, linen and wood textures
SP-05 Hearth & Table.layoutTone: warm table note, appetite-aware, tactile, calm domestic editorial
